name: Cornmeal Cookies r T>
recipeIngredient: 1 cup I Can't Believe It's Not Butter - Light,
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Mix softened butter and sugar until creamy.
3. Beat in egg beaters and vanilla.
4. Mix dry ingredients separately, then add to creamed mixture.
5. Stir in cherries.
6. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto a greased baking sheet, about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake for about 10 minutes or until lightly browned.
8. Remove from the baking sheet while warm and cool on a rack.
Makes 4 dozen
I made them using cherries and vanilla since I didn't have any lemon extract in the cabinets. I decided to use the cherries instead of the raisins as it made a better flavor combination than the raisins with the vanilla.
Jeff and I thought these are great. Very quick and easy to put together and eat!
